ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Of Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Marc T. Cefalu, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by the defaulted defendants Hari Om Hospitality, LLC and Blue Star Hospitality, LLC.
Defaults were entered against defendants Hari Om Hospitality, LLC and Blue Star Hospitality, LLC on June 20, 2017.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Satis Patel was filed on June 23, 2017.
Dismissals without prejudice as to defendants Mahesh Patel and Suresh Patel were filed on June 24, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 13, 2017.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on September 13, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Hari Om Hospitality, LLC and Blue Star Hospitality, LLC, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $23,035.66.
Pre-Judgment Interest - $10,366.07.
Attorney Fees - $3,500.00.
Costs - $700.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $37,601.73.

Proposed judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
